name: Zee5
tagline: Zee Telugu's streaming arm with originals, films, and a deep dubbed catalogue.
intro: Zee5 is the streaming arm of Zee Entertainment, and it carries a substantial Telugu catalogue built on the Zee Telugu television network's long-running relationships with the Telugu film industry. The platform hosts direct-to-OTT premieres, post-theatrical windows for mid-budget releases, Zee5-branded originals across films and series, and an extensive library of older Telugu cinema that rarely appears on other streamers. Zee5's pricing, which undercuts Netflix and Prime Video, has made it a popular second or third subscription for Telugu households rather than a primary service. Our directory indexes every Telugu title we can confirm on Zee5, updated daily from official sources. Each film or series has a dedicated page with streaming date, type, and any additional metadata our enrichment pipeline has indexed, making it straightforward to check where to watch a specific Telugu release.
